messages.subject: Fwd: Re: asd follow up — keith enterprises
messages.body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Sharon - Dynamic Distributors <sharon@dynamicdis.com>
Date: Fri, Apr 3, 2026 at 1:16 PM
Subject: Re: Re: asd follow up — keith enterprises
To: belgianotaatjes@gmail.com <belgianotaatjes@gmail.com>
CC: Mary - Dynamic Distributors <mary@dynamicdis.com>, Monica - Dynamic
Distributors <monica@dynamicdis.com>


 Hi Taatjes,





Following up. Here's what we have right now in HBA and general merchandise
— full list attached. Prestige beauty brands like Clinique, Urban Decay,
Elizabeth Arden, and Rare Beauty all at closeout pricing. Also have
 Farberware candles and some games/toys.





We don't have OTC or vitamins right now but I'll flag those when they come
in. Any particular brands or categories you're looking for? I'll keep them
on my radar.



 Sharon

------------------------------
*From:* Sharon - Dynamic Distributors <sharon@dynamicdis.com>
*Sent:* Tuesday, March 31, 2026 7:57 AM
*To:* belgianotaatjes@gmail.com <belgianotaatjes@gmail.com>
*Cc:* Mary - Dynamic Distributors <mary@dynamicdis.com>
*Subject:* Re: Re: asd follow up — keith enterprises

(Adding other members of the sales team)

Hi,

Thanks for the details on your channels and focus, that is very helpful. I
will check with the team to pull a tight list of current fast-moving HBA,
OTC, and general merchandise that fit your online and mixed-channel
business, and we will follow up for you to review.

Best,
Sharon


On Tue, Mar 31, 2026 at 08:13 AM <belgianotaatjes@gmail.com> wrote:

Hi Sharon,


Great meeting you at ASD as well, I appreciate you reaching out.


We primarily sell through online channels (Amazon/Walmart), with some
retail and export mixed in depending on the deal. We tend to focus heavily
on fast-moving items in HBA, OTC, and general merchandise.


If you can send over a tight list of what you have available right now,
that would be great—especially anything with strong turns and clean pricing.


Looking forward to taking a look.


Best,

Taatjes

On Tue, Mar 31, 2026 at 7:10 AM Sharon - Dynamic Distributors <
sharon@dynamicdis.com> wrote:

We rotate inventory a lot, so what is available today can be gone fast.

If you tell me what channel you sell in most (retail store, online, or
both), I will send a tight list that fits, with pricing and pack sizes.

Which one is it?

Sharon


On Wed, Mar 25, 2026 at 07:06 PM <sharon@dynamicdis.com> wrote:

Hi Taatjes,

Thanks again for stopping by our booth at ASD last week. From what I saw
online, Keith Enterprises keeps things broad, so I wanted to share a quick
intro.

Dynamic Distributors is a U.S. closeout and surplus wholesaler. We move
fast-turn inventory in general merchandise, beauty, fragrance, apparel, and
electronics. It is all authentic, and we ship quick.

If you tell me your top 2 categories, I can send a short list of what is
available right now.

Want me to send that over?

Sharon

messages.subject: Fwd: Natures Way has listed available inventory for Discount Depot LV
messages.body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: vitamin discount <vitamindiscount7@aol.com>
Date: Tue, Apr 14, 2026 at 2:51 AM
Subject: Natures Way has listed available inventory for Discount Depot LV
To: alex@milkywaynovaco.com <alex@milkywaynovaco.com>
CC: belgianotaatjes@gmail.com <belgianotaatjes@gmail.com>




Here's the newest Nature's Way liquidation list

*Natures Way *has listed available inventory.
As a preferred partner, you are invited to submit an offer.

*🏷️ Offer*  -  DUE DATE: Apr 20, 1:00 PM EDT

*Vendor Message*

Happy Monday, Retail Friends! It's amazing what a month will do in the
Midwest; Last month at this time, Wisconsin received record breaking snow
fall and today I'm able to boast about 70 degrees and sunshine! Spring
fever has officially arrived. Offering up nearly 40,000 cases of Wellness
Goodness this month: Be sure to ramp Women's Health inventory where we
honor the women in our lives on Mother's Day Immune season slows in the
summer, but doesn't halt. We've all fallen victim to a summer cold - stock
up now on Sambucus & Umcka immune product for year-round protection. Nearly
10k cases in Alive! Multivitamins - a trusted, potent, affordable legacy
product consumers look for. Plenty of probiotics to keep our guts in check
as we lean into summer BBQ season! Let's make a deal: any inventory
expiring in 2026 - shoot me an offer I cannot refuse! As always, I
appreciate your trust in Nature's Way bringing ultimate wellness options to
your shelves. Any questions or hesitations, certainly reach out and I'd be
happy to serve. Be well! Kristin Kristin.Lipsky@naturesway.com **Friendly
Reminder: Items need to deliver within 30 days of award.
View Offer
<https://u8839261.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.fFH-2BJFb2AI-2BUiWmzxGkoU5dm2JdgRPYz9KPQtvyOhKtKE6uyxgcR-2BP28H1-2B4qc8Q7xvhpMnnKOzO7K9VaQGDkSWezWXebLOyEqKZRPHhomjxRVxoaDSDlcF5s9IXFxHGps6UmZA2KjpcNJnFfx40Q-2F4g-2BIY6183jsyv6KaelDaTXD91iKQT7Pix3RDAX-2Fy9WlZclwnpsLIOgYeUrAMo17a90gT1TtTjQpIrYbL6S0mUr1vXBHRh82bCKzJD70sOGnlW7NgMjNHJqT-2FjiG3uJk4EpeD8-2F7mQ4tClf-2F5K2p0NFErtvYAPZULHcedm9I8gCaqQ6Tc4vx1Ib0GHgwHbuCC-2Bp9xySdOWh9pPqioiFzQA7dTF45le8mncj-2FlExtLHVumdEOHVaj4YCduLRStt2jWFhFQ9HvM-2FWujpvWZss5VQ5AeA-2FWuZmyC-2Ft69DN9q54iD0OWSq-2BFJAkmi5y2gm8B2MCheCiyUq8VkTs98Orkv8-3DUDhz_tIJvJwFt7vHUx33Jx-2BbJOu0Amc3lui-2Fv2Rk60-2Bn9uOAte4ijs0LMTqF5v0ph-2B8elKWVSrQeT1gJdrry-2BdKxvIfO-2B3VpZt16TRUOhIlU89eidz0jV0mxfiEneG6P2oJNG-2FVsW2-2FB2XlZ3mODtViNd4j0s2wkQFmFb0s6D-2BxjNAJ17xLxC0jgLUmoJ0Tpd757b3O9ehQ1n5GF0-2BsH-2B3LmaxWmpaxmAb9uqWhBYw3x3lxcLnFCWnPPTXbRGCQkXsQKySMIxEttsHF8ajHserm3qB1UzwgQ-2FLIyBsZq2kRMI-2BmaxuoR93-2FYDg0GEA3cEz46kOmL2sfo6c-2BJtSAnkzEh0ZmqKTHq5hLHfCxfNA4ZVgJzX7XcgOOHt6Mb0OAM7LPOlMKOX75Izsd5DayN9dQ70fc8v3PC8NmMtgl5R19OUgV-2BVIJl7A1mQL4QNf2nW-2BgYOutflOcwHAjP5jKXlrcsPZsfHp1y70xo-2B8E6xZQLZkAlnryNWhRHQkVIyGmEo-2BTTMv0OIZWDKCmjiEWVzlFQ2jpZMniRsjtGijlzo3m1QSOy3xXb9RWsdu-2Bt14ESkgsDMZrqKsXOpCQln2WSTeT8HuNEFkeVAyMdlIjvBQhxpEOiW9qU3-2BbUGkrmi2ghRHAXiBvYDsZHUJoh6O5qCy7Cwnw-3D-3D>

*🗒️ Additional vendor notes*

Nature’s Way Minimum Order Guidelines:

   - MOQ (value) of $10,000 USD per ship location and per purchase order.
   - Nature’s Way requires for the retailer to order in case quantities.
   - Pallets can be mixed cases of product.

Nature's Way PO and Logistics Guidelines:

   - Nature’s Way ships prepaid, Freight on Board (FOB). We do not have the
   capacity to offer Customer Pickup.
   - Orders must be delivered within 30 days of award.
   - Ship to addresses need to be included on all purchase orders to avoid
   delayed delivery.

*💡 How to submit your offer*

   1.

   Click the “View Offer” button above
   2.

   Download your offer sheet within the Spoiler Alert platform
   3.

   Fill out your offer sheet using Excel
   4.

   Return to Spoiler Alert to submit your offer to your vendor

You may also submit your offer by replying to this email with your offer
sheet attached, or by emailing it to imports+natures-way@spoileralert.com

*📧 Vendor contact*

If you have additional questions about the contents of the offer sheets,
please contact kristin.lipsky@naturesway.com.

CONFIDENTIAL: This email, including attached files, may contain
confidential information and is intended only for the use of the individual
and/or entity to which it is addressed. If you are not the intended
recipient, disclosure, copying, use, or distribution of the information
included in this email is prohibited. Please delete this email immediately
and notify us by replying to this email.

DISCLAIMER: This sheet could contain AI-generated enhanced item
descriptions. These will be noted by a column header and have a risk of
inaccuracy.

scan_results.error: Failed to parse structured data from page
scan_results.raw_response:
The WebFetch tool needs your permission approval to proceed. However, based on what you've shared — the page content is just **"Spoiler Alert Loading Apple"** — this is a Spoiler Alert marketplace page that requires JavaScript to render. The static HTML fetch won't return useful product data.

Here's the result based on what's available:

```json
{"is_product": false, "reason": "Page is a Spoiler Alert marketplace listing that requires JavaScript to render. The static HTML only contains a loading screen ('Spoiler Alert Loading Apple'). Spoiler Alert is a B2B platform for surplus/closeout CPG inventory. To extract product details, the page would need to be accessed in a full browser with JS execution, or the product info should be copied/screenshotted directly from the rendered page."}
```

To get actual product data, you could:
1. **Screenshot the page** in a browser and share the image — I can extract product info from that
2. **Copy-paste the rendered text** from the page
3. Use a headless browser (Puppeteer/Playwright) to render the JS and scrape it

messages.subject: How to port your number(s) out of Quo
messages.body:
Quo's logo ( https://www.quo.com/?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Hey Taatjes,

You're receiving this email because your Quo subscription is no longer active.

Please note that without an active subscription, any phone number not ported to a new carrier will be released back into circulation after 14 days.

If you'd like to reactivate your subscription, you can follow the steps here ( https://support.quo.com/core-concepts/administration/billing/managing-your-subscription?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ) to do so.

Or, if you'd like to port your number to a new carrier, follow the instructions here ( https://support.quo.com/core-concepts/administration/porting-out?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ). If you've already begun the porting process, or have recently renewed your Quo subscription ( https://support.quo.com/core-concepts/administration/billing/managing-your-subscription?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io ), feel free to disregard this email.

If you have any questions or believe you've received this email by mistake, please feel free to reply to this email.

Thanks,
The Quo Team

Quo logo ( https://www.quo.com/?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

LinkedIn ( https://www.linkedin.com/company/gowithquo?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Reddit ( https://www.reddit.com/r/quo/?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )
Twitter ( https://x.com/gowithquo?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )
YouTube ( https://www.youtube.com/@gowithquo?sub_confirmation=1&utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Instagram ( https://www.instagram.com/gowithquo?utm_campaign=Canceled+subscription+porting+reminder&utm_content=Port+your+number+out&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Quo

2261 Market St PMB 4157
San Francisco, CA 94114-1612

 

 

This email was sent to jaxonbelgiano@gmail.com.

scan_results.reason: This is the homepage for Quo (formerly OpenPhone), a B2B SaaS business phone system platform. It is not a physical product listing. The page promotes their cloud-based phone service with features like calling, texting, AI receptionist (Sona), CRM, shared numbers, and integrations. The URL's UTM parameters suggest the user received a canceled subscription email reminding them to port their phone number out.

This is a help/support article for Quo (formerly OpenPhone), a business phone service. The page covers subscription management, billing settings, plan changes, payment methods, and cancellation procedures — not a physical or purchasable product listing.

This is a support/help documentation page for Quo (formerly OpenPhone), a business phone service provider. It explains the process for porting phone numbers out from Quo to another carrier. It contains no product listing, pricing, or purchasable item information.

Yo boys 🫡 quick one so we can keep things moving on our end.  Josh just needs a couple things

1. Seller Assistant login (username + password)
2. Gmail account for the system (login + password)

We’ll need full access to that email initially so we can get everything remaining configured

Also any word on the meta account from Ben? 

Appreciate you! Stoked to get this wrapped up

scan_results.product_name: NAD+ Supplement with Nicotinamide Riboside, Resveratrol & Quercetin
scan_results.description: A multi-ingredient longevity and cellular health supplement combining Nicotinamide Riboside (NR) for NAD+ boosting, Trans-Resveratrol for antioxidant and anti-aging support, and Quercetin as a senolytic and anti-inflammatory flavonoid. Targets the growing anti-aging and longevity supplement market.
scan_results.amazon_category_guess: Health, Household & Personal Care > Vitamins, Minerals & Supplements > Anti-Aging Supplements
key_selling_points: All-in-one NAD+ longevity stack — combines NR, Resveratrol, and Quercetin in a single capsule
Targets cellular energy and healthy aging backed by emerging longevity research
Quercetin acts as a natural senolytic to support clearing of senescent cells
Resveratrol provides potent antioxidant and cardiovascular support
Appeals to the David Sinclair / Bryan Johnson longevity-conscious consumer demographic
scan_results.notes: Listed on Amazon Australia (.com.au). Found via 'NAD supplement' search keywords, appearing as a sponsored result (position 2), indicating active PPC spend. The NAD+/longevity supplement category is highly competitive with established brands like Tru Niagen (ChromaDex), Elysium Basis, and ProHealth Longevity. The combination formula (NR + Resveratrol + Quercetin) is a common private-label stack pattern. ASIN prefix B0DQ suggests a relatively recent listing (late 2024 / early 2025). The sponsored placement and multi-ingredient approach suggest a private-label or newer brand trying to differentiate through ingredient bundling rather than brand recognition.

scan_results.description: Acetyl L-Carnitine supplement by EHPlabs designed to support fat metabolism, energy production, and exercise recovery. L-Carnitine helps transport fatty acids into mitochondria for energy conversion, commonly used as a weight management and performance supplement.
scan_results.amazon_category_guess: Health, Household & Personal Care > Sports Nutrition > Amino Acid Supplements > L-Carnitine
key_selling_points: Supports fat metabolism and conversion of fatty acids to energy
Aids exercise recovery and reduces muscle fatigue
Acetyl form offers enhanced bioavailability and crosses the blood-brain barrier for cognitive support
From EHPlabs, a well-known Australian sports nutrition brand
Stimulant-free fat burning support that stacks well with other supplements
scan_results.notes: EHPlabs is a popular Australian-founded sports nutrition brand. Acetyl L-Carnitine is a highly competitive supplement category with many established brands. This product appeared in search results for 'creatine' (per the URL query parameter), suggesting it is being advertised via sponsored placement to capture cross-category fitness supplement traffic. The .com.au domain indicates this is listed on Amazon Australia.

scan_results.description: A daily cleansing shampoo designed for men, formulated to remove excess oil and product buildup while leaving hair clean and manageable. Part of the American Crew professional men's grooming line.
key_selling_points: Professional-grade men's grooming brand trusted by barbers worldwide
Daily use formula that cleanses without stripping natural oils
Removes product buildup and excess sebum for fresh, clean hair
Suitable for all hair types, especially normal to oily hair
Leaves hair manageable and ready for styling
scan_results.notes: American Crew is one of the most recognized men's grooming brands globally, founded in 1994. Their cleansing shampoo is a staple product in the line. The 'millilitre' in the URL slug suggests this is a metric-sized variant (likely 250ml or 1000ml) sold on the Australian Amazon marketplace (amazon.com.au). Competition is high in the men's shampoo category, but American Crew commands strong brand loyalty and premium positioning.
